channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: “I’m actually hoping we might see more robots on our streets” — this Texas city used robots to improve its sidewalks, and I hope it isn’t the last
item.description: Damaged sidewalks are frustrating to most pedestrians, but this robot could help.

item.title: 'We're by far the most successful player in home theater': why Sonos CEO Tom Conrad isn't worried about LG and TCL muscling in on his turf with Dolby Atmos FlexConnect
item.description: Analysis: Sonos already has the tech it needs for 3D sound, but there's one big missing piece

item.title: What to Do in Dumbo If You’re Here for Business (2026)
item.description: The Big Apple has had a tech boom in the past few years—here’s where to stay, play, eat, and work in the city’s tech-dense Dumbo neighborhood.

item.title: The best Samsung Galaxy S26 and S26 Plus plans in Australia for March 2026
item.description: Pre-orders for the Samsung Galaxy S26 and S26 Plus have wrapped up, but the major telcos still have their specials active — I’ve compared all your options to find the best deals around

item.title: Grammarly Allegedly ‘Misappropriated’ Names of Journalists, Says Class Action Suit
item.description: The Grammarly Expert Review feature included the names of writers and literary figures without consulting them first.

item.title: The best Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra plans in Australia for March 2026
item.description: Want the new Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra on a plan? I’ve found the best offers from the major Aussie telcos.

item.title: How to beat the fuel crisis — these are the 3 affordable EVs I recommend as an electric car reviewer
item.description: The Middle East conflict is forcing gasp prices up, so could now be the best time to switch to an EV?
